_comment_: SellerSheet MCP is a HOSTED remote server (streamable HTTP) — there is nothing to install locally. Paste this into your agent's MCP config file, or use your agent's one-command add (see _per_agent_ below). Get an API key at https://sellersheetai.com/dashboard → MCP & API keys → Create Key.

_per_agent_.claude-desktop: Settings → Connectors → Add custom connector → URL https://sellersheetai.com/mcp (OAuth, no key needed)
_per_agent_.codex: codex mcp add sellersheet --url https://sellersheetai.com/mcp   (browser OAuth on first use — no key needed; config.toml uses http_headers, NOT headers, if you set a Bearer manually)
_per_agent_.cursor: ~/.cursor/mcp.json — mcpServers block above without the "type" field
_per_agent_.windsurf-antigravity: use "serverUrl" instead of "url" in the block above
_per_agent_.generic: any MCP client that supports streamable HTTP: url + Authorization Bearer header

_setup_steps_: 2. Dashboard → MCP & API keys → Create Key (skip for OAuth clients like Claude Desktop / codex mcp add)
5. Ask the agent to run get_user_context to confirm the connection
